place_results.title: Herald Square Dental & The Denture Center
place_results.address: 224 W 35th St 16th Floor, New York, NY 10001
place_results.hours_last_updated: Confirmed by this business 9 weeks ago

posts.description:
The sun is officially at its peak!

Happy Summer Solstice! As we kick off the first official day of summer, it’s the perfect time for a ""Seasonal Reset."" The year is halfway through—is your smile where you want it to be?

Start the season with:
✨ A professional whitening to match your summer glow.
✨ A fresh toothbrush for your travel bag.
✨ A cleaning to keep your breath fresh for all those summer BBQs.

The days are long, but summer flies by! Click the link in our bio to grab a spot in our July calendar before the vacations begin. 🦷

#SummerReady #FirstDayOfSummer #DentalHealth #SmileGlowUp #SolsticeCelebration

It’s Father’s Day, which means the ""Dad Jokes"" are officially at an all-time high.

Our favorite today? "When is the best time to go to the dentist?" "Tooth-hurty!" 🦷

Today, we celebrate the dads, grandpas, and father figures who show us how to be brave, stay strong, and—of course—keep us laughing (even when the jokes are cheesy) through it all.

Whether it's post-game celebrations or helping with those first wobbly baby teeth, thanks for everything you do. Wishing all the incredible dads a relaxing and happy Father's Day.

#FathersDay #DadJokes #SmileMonth #DentalHumor #DadSmile

Red, White, and True!

Today we fly the Stars and Stripes in honor of Flag Day. Since 1777, Old Glory has stood as a symbol of our shared history, resilience, and pride.

Our team at The Smilist is proud to serve our communities from Virginia to Massachusetts and keep our neighbors smiling bright. We hope everyone has a safe and beautiful day of celebration!

#FlagDay #OldGlory #CommunityPride #June14 #RedWhiteAndBlue

Dentistry has its own language, and we know that terms like ""composite filling"" or ""crown"" can sound a bit mysterious if you aren't in the field! At The Smilist, we believe that an informed patient is a confident patient.

Understanding common procedures doesn't just ease dental anxiety—it helps you take charge of your oral health journey. Whether you’re due for a routine ""prophy"" (that’s fancy talk for a cleaning!) or you’re curious about restorative options like bridges and implants, we’ve got you covered.

We’ve created a ""Dental Cheat Sheet"" on our blog to explain:
✅ What actually happens during a filling.
✅ The difference between a bridge and an implant.
✅ Why routine cleanings are the secret to long-term health.
✅ ...and more!

Demystify your next visit! Read our full guide to common dental procedures below: 👉

See your smile more clearly with advanced dental technology at Herald Square Dental & The Denture Center. Our latest blog explores how Overjet AI-supported imaging helps patients better understand cavities, bone loss, gum disease, and dental implant treatment planning through enhanced digital X-rays and AI-assisted diagnostics.

Learn how modern technology is helping improve patient education, communication, and personalized care in NYC.

Today, we pause to honor and remember the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country.

At The Smilist, we are incredibly grateful for their courage and for the families they left behind. Our offices are closed today as our team takes this time to reflect and spend time with loved ones.

Wishing our entire community a safe and meaningful Memorial Day.#MemorialDay 

#TheSmilist #RememberAndHonor #CommunityFirst

Brighten Your Smile Just in Time for Summer!

Ready for a whiter, more confident smile? Herald Square Dental is offering a special on professional Zoom Teeth Whitening for a limited time!

🦷 $150 OFF Zoom Whitening
💎 Immediate results
⏱️ Completed in just one visit
🎉 In-office whitening treatment valued at $500

📅 Offer ends June 30, 2026

Book your appointment today with Herald Square Dental!

Let’s clear the air about Root Canals.

If the words "root canal" make you nervous, you aren't alone—but you might be surprised to learn the truth! At The Smilist, we view a root canal as a hero procedure. Why? Because it’s the most effective way to eliminate a painful infection while keeping your natural smile intact.

The goal isn't just to fix a tooth; it’s to get you back to living your life pain-free.

Are you experiencing any of these?
⚠️ Persistent tooth pain that keeps you up at night
⚠️ Extreme sensitivity to hot or cold
⚠️ Swelling or tenderness in the gums

If so, a root canal might be the solution you need to feel like yourself again. Our experts use the latest technology to ensure the process is smooth, comfortable, and efficient.Still have questions about the timing, the process, or the recovery? We’ve answered all your top questions in our latest blog post!

Click below to read more!

#TheSmilist #RootCanal #DentalHealth #ToothPainRelief #DentalEducation #SaveYourSmile #OralHealthCare

To the women who give us a million reasons to smile—Happy Mother’s Day! 💐

Today we celebrate the moms, grandmothers, and mother figures who do it all. From being the tooth fairy’s official assistant to teaching us the importance of a healthy smile, you are the heart of the family.

We hope your day is filled with love, relaxation, and plenty of reasons to show off those pearly whites! 😊

#MothersDay #TheSmilist #MomsSmile #FamilyDental #CelebrateMoms

Meet the specialist behind your smile’s foundation.

We often focus on the "white" part of our smile, but the "pink" part is just as vital! At The Smilist, our Periodontists are the specialists dedicated to the foundation of your oral health: your gums and the bone that supports your teeth.

If you’ve ever wondered why someone might need to see a "gum specialist," it’s about more than just routine cleaning. Periodontists handle everything from treating advanced gum disease to placing dental implants and performing cosmetic gum contouring.

Signs it might be time to see a Periodontist:
🚩 Gums that are red, swollen, or bleed easily.
🚩 A "receding" gum line (teeth looking longer than they used to).
🚩 Persistent bad breath that won't go away.
🚩 Loose teeth or changes in how your bite feels.

Don't wait for discomfort to take action! Healthy gums are the key to keeping your natural teeth for a lifetime.

We’ve put together the ultimate Periodontist Guide to help you understand how these specialists protect your health. Click the link to learn more! Read the full guide below!

summary.snippet: "Dont walk run away from this place they just want your money!!!"
"Amazing doctors, amazing hygienists, very kind front desk."

most_relevant.description: Have been coming here forever. Trustable staff! I always feel like I'm in good hands and Dr Shirzadnia has been my dentist for almost 20 years. Sneha is one of the hygienists and she was amazing today. But the whole team is fabulous.

Meet your new dentist - Doctor Shirzadnia

I have been a patient of Doctor Shirzadnia at Herald Square Dental & The Denture Center since 2022.  I initially went there for a consultation to discuss how I might be able to avoid getting dentures on my bottom teeth. I was also curious about getting braces for the top teeth.  That day, Doctor Shirzadnia and I came up with plan that I would get braces and implants.  This was going to be a process because of how my dental insurance worked and my how much I put into my FSA account.  I was really nervous to go to that initial appointment because …TEETH!   Doctor Shirzadnia made me feel better from the start.  He really listened to me and answered all my many questions.   His knowledge, expertise and confidence calmed me, and I knew I was at the right place.  Braces came first.  I would come in to have them tightened about once a month and every time I arrived the entire office staff was super friendly.  I really look forward to seeing Fran, Ro and Stephanie when I walk in every month.

I was going to have the braces for a while until I got my left bottom implants. It is a bridge, and he had to pull a painful tooth so there were a few stages that I went thru with the healing, bone fusion abutments and implants.   I had many questions throughout the whole process and whenever I had a question Doctor Shirzadnia would stop to listen to my question and then explain the answer in a way I understood and he would always make sure that I was comfortable and satisfied with his explanations/answers.   The whole time that I was going thru my treatment, Nicole, the Patient Care Coordinator was working with my insurance company to be sure everything that could be covered, would be covered.  Nicole is super patient and understands that billing and insurance can be confusing to the patient. She will sit with me and go over every line of the patient ledger, benefits claims and anything else related to billing until I am sure I understand.  There were a few times when I thought that the insurance was not going to cover something and she talked me off a ledge because it was covered.
I can’t leave out the dental assistants Ermal, George and Jeab. They are wonderful and work very well with Doctor Shirzadnia.  Eileen is the Dental Hygienist and I get 3 cleanings every year because of the braces. She is thorough and gentle.

So, in review I would like to recommend Doctor Shirzadnia and the entire team at Herald Square Dental & The Denture Center for all of your dental needs.  If you are younger than 55 (my age) don’t let the words “denture center” keep you from going in to see them.  They do ALL the dental “stuff”.    My teeth look amazing. The top braces came off today.  I can eat nuts and crunchy things now.  My life is exponentially better than it was before I walked in that day in 2022.   I have more confidence when I smile. My quality of life without tooth pain is a middle-aged person’s dream come true.  Make the appointment you have been putting off. Go see Dr. Shirzadnia and the Team at Herald Square Dental & The Denture Center!

Dr. Yam and Amir great! Nicole very efficient and friendly. Front desk neat and orderly. The atmosphere overall was very calming. I was anxious and very unsettled when I arrived for my procedure ,however, because of the staff's professionalism and care I was soon able to relax. I had to come back a week later b/c of physics-scheduling was a breeze and my concerns were immediately resolved.

I went to the dentist on Wednesday, Feb 4, 2026 for a cleaning and examination.  I have been going to Dr Pasch's practice for almost 30 years now, and the excellent dental care I've always received dates back to the 34th Street location.

Yesterday's visit was somewhat routine:  x-rays, a cleaning (that included some scaling and scraping) and then an examination afterwards by Dr Yam.

The dental hygienist was Madeline.  She was very carful and precise with the x-rays and then the cleaning.  Madeline truly has a light touch!

Dr.Yam then did the physical examination afterwards.  He has always been thorough and detailed, with clear explanations provided.  I think that Dr Yam is following in the footsteps of Dr Pasch, a true giant in the field.

Dr. Vinciguerra did an excellent job on my teeth.  . He made my crown and  completed the crown restoration all in 1 visit. He did my upper left bridgework in 2 visits. He pulled 2 wisdom teeth in 1 visit with very little pain. He completed a lot of work on my teeth with very little time with great results. I highly recommend Dr. Vinciguerra he is the best that ever did it with a Superb Staff. Front staff are very Pleasant, Professional and Courteous all the times. Now I am happy, Great Job! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I came to this establishment a couple of years ago when my front tooth crown that I got as a teenager fell out. The first time I went was not bad they made the flipper and that was that. I paid about $600. Today I came in because I need a replacement after having a lot of dental work done in the past year. The woman on the phone told me that the price has now almost doubled, to over $1000, but to come in and speak with the doctor because they can possibly help me out. So, my appointment was for 930am. I arrived at 935 and let them know I was there. After almost an hour of waiting and watching everyone else get called I finally asked when I would be seen since my appointment had well passed. They then realized that they never actually even checked me in and that they would be with me in a few. They couldn’t find the forms I filled out online. Then left me there for another 30 mins. At this point I’m getting frustrated so I asked when I would be seen because it’s been an hour and a half. The woman then tries to accuse me of coming in late anyway because she thought I arrived after 10 when I did not. I told them to check their cameras because I was indeed there at 935. Then the doctor finally calls me in just to tell me there’s nothing they can do as far as the price so it was just a big fat waste of my time. Unorganized and unhelpful.

Sneha has been phenomenal in my dental cleaning process. I had such a great experience with Sneha for my dental cleaning that I felt compelled to share. From the moment I walked in, she created a calm and welcoming environment that immediately put me at ease. Dental visits can sometimes feel stressful, but Sneha has a way of making the entire process feel smooth and comfortable.

What really stood out to me was how gentle and thorough she was throughout the cleaning. She took her time, explained each step clearly, and made sure I was comfortable the entire time. There was no rushing, no discomfort—just a very professional and attentive approach that made a huge difference.

The cleaning itself was surprisingly easy and completely stress-free. Sneha’s technique is excellent, and I could tell she genuinely cares about her patients’ comfort and dental health. She also shared helpful tips for the future without overwhelming me, which I really appreciated, so if you’re someone who gets anxious about dental appointments or just wants a reliable, skilled professional, I highly recommend Sneha. She made what is usually a routine appointment into a genuinely positive experience.

I had a wonderful experience @ Herald Square Dental. Madeline, the Hygienist & X-ray Tech was gentle & kind. Amer, who consulted me re: my treatment plan, was patient & understanding. Dr Yam was terrific. He took the time to explain each procedure & why they were needed. He was pleasant & professional. The rest of the staff was also kind & helpful. I highly recommend this practice to everyone. Herald Square Dental delivers high quality service @ all levels.
